clothing_feel: I want my clothes to make me feel comfortable, relaxed, and like myself. I don’t like outfits that feel too stiff or overdone. I prefer clothes that I can move freely in and that reflect my everyday lifestyle. Whether I’m out running errands or meeting up with friends, I want my outfit to feel effortless but still put-together. Comfort is key, but I also want to feel confident and at ease in what I’m wearing.

style_preferences: I prefer a simple and clean aesthetic. I care a lot about how an outfit aligns with the overall environment or setting—it should feel consistent and intentional. While I do enjoy incorporating color into my outfits, I’m not a fan of excessive or overly decorative designs. For me, the cut and texture of the clothing matter more than flashy details. A well-structured silhouette and thoughtful fabric choice can elevate even the most minimal pieces.

clothing_feel: I want my clothes to make me feel sincere, straightforward, and efficient. They should reflect who I am without trying too hard—something that feels natural and true to myself. I value comfort and function, but also the quiet confidence that comes from wearing something that aligns with my identity.
